attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
	SSISAI.BATCH_ID,
	SSISAI.SUB_ACCOUNT_VALUE BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE,
	SSISAI.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
	SSISAI.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
	SSISAI.ACCOUNT_VALUE BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
	SSISAI.SUB_ACCOUNT_NAME SUBACCOUNT_NAME,
	SSISAI.USAGE_DESCRIPTION SUBACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION,
	SSISAI.LOCAL_BALANCE_SHEET_OWNER_ID  LOCAL_SUBACCT_OWNER_PARTY_KEY,
	SSISAI.ACCOUNT_VALUE SK_ACCOUNT_VALUE_CODE,
	SSISAI.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT,	
	SSISAI.SUB_ACCOUNT_VALUE SK_SUB_ACCOUNT_VALUE_CODE,
	CAST(SSISAI.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
SSISAI.ENABLED_FLAG ENABLED_FLAG,
	SSISAI.CREATE_DATETIME EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
	SSISAI.ACTION_CODE,
	'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
	$$STGDB.ST_SI_SUB_ACCOUNT_INFO SSISAI
WHERE (NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TV NFATV
		WHERE SSISAI.ACCOUNT_VALUE = NFATV.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
		AND NFATV.END_TV_DATE=16000101)
	OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_SUBACCT_LOCALITY_TV NFSLTV,$$STGDB.STSI_FLEX_VALUE_SET_STRUCT STFVSST
		WHERE  /* SSISAI.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID = NFSLTV.SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT */  /* changed  as part of CR NOV 2009 */
		    NFSLTV.END_TV_DATE=16000101
		and STFVSST.SI_FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFSLTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT  /* Added as part of CR  NOV 2009*/ 
		and STFVSST.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID= SSISAI.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID)  /* Added as part of CR  NOV 2009*/ 
	OR (NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_TV NCWP
		WHERE SSISAI.LOCAL_BALANCE_SHEET_OWNER_ID = NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID
		AND NCWP.END_TV_DATE=16000101) 
		AND SSISAI.LOCAL_BALANCE_SHEET_OWNER_ID IS NOT NULL )
	)

SELECT
	TVOUTPUT.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE,
	TVOUTPUT.SUBACCOUNT_NAME, 
	TVOUTPUT.SUBACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION,
	TVOUTPUT.LOCAL_SUBACCT_OWNER_PARTY_KEY,
	TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE,
	COALESCE(MAX(CAST(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE AS DATE) - INTERVAL '1' DAY) OVER 
	(PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE, TVOUTPUT.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT, 
	TVOUTPUT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,TVOUTPUT .BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
	ORDER	BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC
	ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING),DATE '3500-01-01') AS END_TV_DATE,
	TVOUTPUT.SK_ACCOUNT_VALUE_CODE,
	TVOUTPUT.SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT,
	TVOUTPUT.SK_SUB_ACCOUNT_VALUE_CODE,
	TVOUTPUT.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
	TVOUTPUT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
	TVOUTPUT .BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
	TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE,
	(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND NFSTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) DML_TYPE,
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE, TVOUTPUT.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT, 
	TVOUTPUT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ,TVOUTPUT .BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
	ORDER	BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC) AS RANK_INDEX
FROM	
(
	SELECT	
	BATCH_ID,
	BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE,
	SUBACCOUNT_NAME, 
	SUBACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION,
	LOCAL_SUBACCT_OWNER_PARTY_KEY,
	BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
	START_TV_DATE,
	SK_ACCOUNT_VALUE_CODE,
	SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT, 
	SK_SUB_ACCOUNT_VALUE_CODE, 
	BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
	BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
	EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
	ACTION_CODE,
	EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY 	TVINPUT.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE,
					TVINPUT.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
					TVINPUT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
					TVINPUT.SUBACCOUNT_NAME,
					TVINPUT.LOCAL_SUBACCT_OWNER_PARTY_KEY,
					TVINPUT .BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
	ORDER	BY EDW_CREATE_DATETIME DESC) AS ROW_NUM 
FROM	
(
		SELECT	
			SSISAI.BATCH_ID,
			SSISAI.SUB_ACCOUNT_VALUE BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE,
			NFSLTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
			NFATV.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
			SSISAI.SUB_ACCOUNT_NAME SUBACCOUNT_NAME,
			SSISAI.USAGE_DESCRIPTION SUBACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION,
			NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY LOCAL_SUBACCT_OWNER_PARTY_KEY,
			NFSLTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
			SSISAI.ACCOUNT_VALUE SK_ACCOUNT_VALUE_CODE,
			SSISAI.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT, 
			SSISAI.SUB_ACCOUNT_VALUE SK_SUB_ACCOUNT_VALUE_CODE,
			CAST(SSISAI.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
			SSISAI.CREATE_DATETIME EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
			SSISAI.ACTION_CODE,
			'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
		FROM	
			$$STGDB.ST_SI_SUB_ACCOUNT_INFO SSISAI 
			LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_TV NCWP
			ON SSISAI.LOCAL_BALANCE_SHEET_OWNER_ID = NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID 
			AND NCWP.END_TV_DATE=16000101,
			$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_SUBACCT_LOCALITY_TV NFSLTV,
			$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TV NFATV,
			$$STGDB.STSI_FLEX_VALUE_SET_STRUCT STFVSST /* changed  as part of CR NOV 2009 */ 
		WHERE	
			/* SSISAI.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID = NFSLTV.SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT  */ /* changed  as part of CR NOV 2009 */ 
			STFVSST.SI_FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFSLTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT /* changed  as part of CR NOV 2009 */ 
			AND	NFATV.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = SSISAI.ACCOUNT_VALUE
			AND	NFSLTV.END_TV_DATE=16000101
			AND	NFATV.END_TV_DATE=16000101
			AND	SSISAI.SUB_ACCOUNT_VALUE <> 'T'
			AND STFVSST.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID= SSISAI.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID  /* Added as part of CR  NOV 2009*/ 
	UNION	ALL
		SELECT	
			EXSISAI.BATCH_ID,
			EXSISAI.SUB_ACCOUNT_VALUE BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE,
			NFSLTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
			NFATV.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
			EXSISAI.SUB_ACCOUNT_NAME SUBACCOUNT_NAME,
			EXSISAI.USAGE_DESCRIPTION SUBACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION,
			NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY LOCAL_SUBACCT_OWNER_PARTY_KEY,
			NFSLTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
			EXSISAI.ACCOUNT_VALUE SK_ACCOUNT_VALUE_CODE,
			EXSISAI.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT, 
			EXSISAI.SUB_ACCOUNT_VALUE SK_SUB_ACCOUNT_VALUE_CODE,
			CAST(EXSISAI.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
			EXSISAI.CREATE_DATETIME EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
			EXSISAI.ACTION_CODE,
			EXSISAI.EXCEPTION_TYPE
		FROM	
			$$EXCEPDB.EX_SI_SUB_ACCOUNT_INFO EXSISAI 
			LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_TV NCWP
			ON EXSISAI.LOCAL_BALANCE_SHEET_OWNER_ID = NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID 
			AND NCWP.END_TV_DATE=16000101,
			$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIN_SUBACCT_LOCALITY_TV NFSLTV,
			$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TV NFATV,
			$$STGDB.STSI_FLEX_VALUE_SET_STRUCT STFVSST /* changed  as part of CR NOV 2009 */ 
		WHERE	/*  EXSISAI.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID =  NFSLTV.SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT  */ /* changed  as part of CR NOV 2009 */ 
				STFVSST.SI_FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = NFSLTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT /* changed  as part of CR NOV 2009 */ 
			AND	NFATV.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = EXSISAI.ACCOUNT_VALUE
			AND	NFSLTV.END_TV_DATE=16000101
			AND	NFATV.END_TV_DATE=16000101
			AND	EXSISAI.SUB_ACCOUNT_VALUE <> 'T'
			and STFVSST.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID= EXSISAI.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID  /* Added as part of CR  NOV 2009*/ 
	UNION	ALL
		SELECT	
			-999 BATCH_ID,
			NFSTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE ,
			NFSTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
			NFSTV.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ,
			NFSTV.SUBACCOUNT_NAME, 
			NFSTV.SUBACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION,
			NFSTV.LOCAL_SUBACCT_OWNER_PARTY_KEY,
			NFSTV.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT ,
			NFSTV.SK_ACCOUNT_VALUE_CODE,
			NFSTV.SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT,
			NFSTV.SK_SUB_ACCOUNT_VALUE_CODE,
			NFSTV.START_TV_DATE,
			NFSTV.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
			'X' ACTION_CODE,
			'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
		FROM	
			$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_SUBACCOUNT_TV NFSTV
			WHERE	(NFSTV.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE, NFSTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE, NFSTV.SK_SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID_INT) IN
			(
				SELECT	SSISAI.ACCOUNT_VALUE , SSISAI.SUB_ACCOUNT_VALUE , SSISAI.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID 
				FROM	$$STGDB.ST_SI_SUB_ACCOUNT_INFO SSISAI
			   UNION ALL
				SELECT	EXSISAI.ACCOUNT_VALUE , EXSISAI.SUB_ACCOUNT_VALUE , EXSISAI.SI_FLEX_STRUCT_ID 
				FROM 	$$EXCEPDB.EX_SI_SUB_ACCOUNT_INFO EXSISAI
			)
			AND NFSTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
	) TVINPUT
	QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE,
						 TVINPUT.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
						 TVINPUT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
						 TVINPUT.BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
						 TVINPUT.START_TV_DATE 
	ORDER	BY TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME DESC) = 1
)TVOUTPUT
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_SUBACCOUNT_TV NFSTV
	ON	TVOUTPUT.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE = NFSTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
	AND	TVOUTPUT.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT = NFSTV.BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT
	AND	TVOUTPUT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = NFSTV.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
	AND	TVOUTPUT .BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT=NFSTV .BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT
	AND	NFSTV.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
WHERE	TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM=1
